title: ConfirmationRequest
description: Displayed to the user before any irreversible action is executed. The UI must show all required fields and block execution until a decision is recorded. Silent auto-approval is never permitted.

app_name.description: Human-readable app name shown in the confirmation UI, e.g. 'WhatsApp'.

action_summary.description: One-sentence plain-language description of what will happen, e.g. 'Send a message to Alice'.

recipient.description: Who the action targets, if applicable.

content_preview.description: Preview of content that will be submitted (message text, form value, etc.).

expires_at.description: If set, the confirmation automatically moves to 'expired' after this time and the plan is aborted.

resolved_at.description: When the user approved or rejected.
